description: Sector overlay for telecommunications operators, internet providers, mobile/fixed networks, spectrum, postal/electronic communications, tariff transparency, QoS, and consumer-protection documentation in Togo.

metadata.scope: Togo-only sector overlay controls for Telecom. Intended to be used with togo_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Togolese and applicable regional legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Electronic communications law and ARCEP framework materials
ANCy cybersecurity materials
primary_sources.issuer: Agence Nationale de la Cybersécurité / Togolese Republic

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Togolese laws, regional WAEMU/OHADA/CIMA instruments, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.
Automated results are screening signals only and require qualified human legal/compliance review.

rules.title: ARCEP licence, authorization, or operator-status evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ARCEP licence, authorization, operator status, ISP/mobile/fixed network authorization, or postal/electronic communications approval.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Quality-of-service, network performance, or coverage evidence is documented
rules.summary: Checks for QoS, coverage, network availability, service indicators, outages, or performance reporting evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Tariff, offer transparency, or customer information evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for tariffs, fees, offer conditions, price transparency, customer notice, or complaint-handling evidence.
